since_last: 22% of 85 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 22% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.03% · Gold +0.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 22% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.11%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.11%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +10.75%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +10.75%, INOD +7.79%, SPCX +5.31%, TLN +5.26%, DLR +3.00%. Laggards: SNAP -8.93%, MRVL -8.88%, INTC -8.09%, AMD -7.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.31% at $202.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
